indication: Treatment of persistent, recurrent, or metastatic cervical cancer in adults whose tumours express PD-L1 with a CPS >= 1.
description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved pembrolizumab in combination with paclitaxel (175 mg/m^2) and carboplatin (AUC-5) for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of adult patients with persistent, recurrent, or metastatic cervical cancer whose tumors express PD-L1 with a combined positive score (CPS) >= 1.
raw_therapeutics: Pembrolizumab, PACLitaxel 175mg/m2 and CARBOplatin AUC 5 Therapy
reimbursement_comment: Pembrolizumab - Reimbursement by exception; Paclitaxel, Carboplatin - N/A

document.name: Pembrolizumab, PACLitaxel 175mg/m2 and CARBOplatin AUC 5 Therapy. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
